title: Digital Citizenship for Grade 5
description: An interactive intelligent textbook for Grade 5 Digital Citizenship, aligned to the ISTE Student Standards 1.2 Digital Citizen indicators (digital identity, safe & ethical behavior, intellectual property, personal data privacy & security). Eight modules covering foundations, media balance, privacy, digital footprint, relationships, cyberbullying, misinformation, and critical thinking, plus a capstone Digital Citizenship Toolkit.
creator: Dan McCreary
